name: PurePure (Rabbit Hole)
description:
(Edit: S-she’s not Miku? Sorry. Also updated description, she was acting too submissive and masochistic before and it was not intended.)
PurePure, a character based from the song ‘Rabbit Hole’. 
Love deprived Idol turns borderline nihilistic nymphomaniac.

Both smut and fluff potential, but mostly smut. You can both slow burn or get a quick one with her.

Maybe love her.
Maybe just use her.
Maybe give her therapy?
Or just get fucked silly by her.

Note that the original PurePure has only a 3 minute animation with barely any personality, and the interpretation of the lyrics to apply to her character is my personal take.
Designed for Male POV, but not hard coded, so you could manage WLW with her too.

(Man, that one Rabbit Hole animation got me horny, Ok!?)
creator: Dyn4mi
